title: Rustic Slovakian Bread Toast
description: A light and nostalgic Slovakian dish featuring stale bread, beurre-monte, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, with a rich umami flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the stale bread into 1 inch thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Bake the bread in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
While the bread is baking, mix the beurre-monte, turmeric, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
Remove the bread from the oven and brush the beurre-monte mixture evenly over each slice.
Return the bread to the oven and bake for an additional 2 minutes, or until the beurre-monte is melted and bubbly.
Remove the bread from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the rustic Slovakian bread toast warm and enjoy.
